channel.title: Git on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Git on Arrans github.io

item.title: jesseduffield/lazygit
item.description: simple terminal UI for git commands

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
item.description: Windows/macOS/Linux GUI client for GIT users

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: https://discuss.logseq.com/t/logseq-product-roadmap/34267

item.title: dlvhdr/diffnav
item.description: A git diff pager based on delta but with a file tree, à la GitHub.

item.title: git-bug/git-bug
item.description: Distributed, offline-first bug tracker embedded in git

item.title: GitbookIO/gitbook
item.description: The open source frontend for GitBook doc sites

item.title: orhun/git-cliff
item.description: A highly customizable Changelog Generator that follows Conventional Commit specifications ⛰️

item.title: usebruno/bruno
item.description: Opensource IDE For Exploring and Testing API’s (lightweight alternative to Postman/Insomnia)

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: go-git/go-git
item.description: A highly extensible Git implementation in pure Go.

item.title: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: orayemre/Notemod
item.description: Note-Taking App Free & Open Source

item.title: eficode-academy/git-katas
item.description: A set of exercises for deliberate Git Practice

item.title: kazhuravlev/git-tools
item.description: Useful set of tools which helps to manage git tags

item.title: hickford/git-credential-oauth
item.description: A Git credential helper that securely authenticates to GitHub, GitLab and BitBucket using OAuth.

item.title: sameersbn/docker-gitlab
item.description: Dockerized GitLab

item.title: AkashRajpurohit/git-sync
item.description: 🔄 A simple tool to backup and sync your git repositories

item.title: Tanq16/backhub
item.description: Backhub helps maintain backups of multiple GitHub repos as full local mirrors.

item.title: muesli/gitty
item.description: Contextual information about your git projects, right on the command-line

item.title: epwr/git-credential-with-kwallet
item.description: The easiest (encrypted) way to store your git credentials on KDE. Requires KDE Wallet for Plasma 5.

item.title: arran4/git-barcode-sheet
item.description: Git barcode based cheat sheet
